generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature measurement (first sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for internal temperature measurement (second sensor)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer sensor for external ambient temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmission
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2
]

instance ExternalTemperatureDataTransmission : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature data from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance ExternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time external ambient temperature data from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmission
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FaultDetectionEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Computer-Aided Design model for structural attributes of the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model using differential equations for thermal dynamics of the styrofoam box system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler, PredictiveEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimizationEnabler
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulation service using CAD and thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance PredictiveEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for predictive service using thermal model and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time monitoring service checking safety and optimality"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for fault detection algorithm using temperature data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for state estimation including calibration of model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for supervisory control logic based on monitored data"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance OptimizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimization algorithm improving system efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service replicating Physical Twin's behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive service forecasting Physical Twin's future behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for safety and operational optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection service identifying anomalies in system operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service determining current system state"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimateInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control service managing system operations based on monitored data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization service improving system efficiency and reliability"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated behavior of the thermal system under various conditions"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted future behavior of the thermal system"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Current safety status of the thermal system against predefined limits"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of operational efficiency and optimality of the thermal system"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected fault or anomaly in the thermal system operation"
]

instance StateEstimateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system components"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized settings for heatbed and fan to enhance system performance"
]

instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of heatbed power and fan speed to maintain thermal limits"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HumanInterventionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual intervention required when safety limits are violated"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for heating interior of styrofoam box"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for thermal distribution within styrofoam box"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box enclosure providing thermal insulation"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller managing heatbed power and fan speed with safety constraints"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system for experimental temperature regulation"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPiController, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to RabbitMQ server to receive commands for actuating the fan and heatbed, processing commands upon receipt and executing corresponding actuation on physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies, with a structure where calibration algorithms update the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environmental models using sensor data to provide parameter estimates; this data informs monitoring systems that assess safety and optimal performance, with human or algorithmic interventions triggered upon violation detection."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment parameters using sensor data to achieve best estimates, while monitoring systems validate safety and optimality performance against operational conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication is mediated by RabbitMQ, a lightweight message broker. The Raspberry Pi host has built-in Wi-Fi and Bluetooth hardware for network connectivity. Network protocols, topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, and security protocols are not explicitly specified beyond RabbitMQ's lightweight nature."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The RabbitMQ server is hosted on a Raspberry Pi in an on-premise deployment. The provided documents do not mention data storage capabilities, scalability mechanisms, or edge device usage. Computational requirements and real-time processing capabilities are not explicitly defined."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs monitoring systems to continuously assess the Physical Twin's operational safety and optimality; upon detection of safety violations, corrective actions are initiated by human operators or automated algorithms to adjust the Physical Twin's configuration."
]
